'''Egron''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] of [[Chibias/Legends|Chibias]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Egron came to own a [[Computer core/Legends|computer core]] that he believed contained the control codes of a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], and planned to sell those codes to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. He employed [[Markko]] to slice the computer core, but Markko was unable to finish the job by himself. When he contracted [[Zakarisz Ghent|Ghent]] to do it, Markko was unprepared for the unexpected arrival of [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]]. At first, Egron managed to evade Mara's attempts to kill him—but, unfortunately for Egron, he underestimated Mara's talents. Mara shot Egron in the chest, [[Death/Legends|killing]] him instantly.<ref name="Handoff" />
